Packet Buffer Reference
Table Summary Microbursts Trident+ Trident II Deep Buffer

NANOG Buffer Size Discussion (2012)

The buffer size question was discussed on the NANOG mailing list in 2012. The original archived thread is preserved in the source Bufs/nanog-thread.html file.

Key topics covered in the thread:

  • What is the right buffer size for campus core switches?
  • How do TCP dynamics interact with buffer depth?
  • Shared vs. per-port buffer architectures
  • Real-world measurements of microburst impact

See Also

  • Microbursts
  • Summary: Buffer Sizing
  • Back to the main buffer table
Source: Jim Warner, UCSC (archived 2014). Information is by rumor, innuendo, and extrapolation. Manufacturers rarely publish packet buffer data in their data sheets.
